response.overview: An accidental car crash kills Jacqueline, the Nichols' second daughter. Victor, their spokesperson, furious, blames Jensen family, leading to Allison's father and brother's death; her mother and herself are arrested.  To vie for Wayne family's commercial land rights, Victor blackmails Allison's mother to have her replace Jacqueline, marrying Alec Wayne, Wayne's third-gen heir. As a Wayne wife, Allison forms an unexpected bond with Eric, fiancé's uncle-in-law, learns of danger, and embarks on a self-rescue mission amidst a love-hate dynamic with Eric.
response.title: Unlawful Desires
